title: GeneratePlanResponse
description: Full response from the Lineal /generate-plan endpoint, containing the outputs of all three agents in the multi-agent pipeline.

prompt.description: The original urban planning prompt submitted by the user.
prompt.example: Reduce flooding in the low-lying residential districts near the river

proposed_actions.description: Agent 1 (Construction Agent) output — list of proposed urban interventions.

action.description: Short title of the proposed action.

description.description: Detailed description of what the action entails.
description.example: Construct a network of underground reinforced-concrete retention tanks with a combined capacity of 50,000 m³ to capture excess stormwater during heavy rainfall events.

estimated_cost_usd.description: Estimated implementation cost in US dollars.

latitude.description: Geospatial latitude for the action center point.

longitude.description: Geospatial longitude for the action center point.

validated_actions.description: Agent 2 (Feasibility Agent) output — each proposed action assessed against the urban rules knowledge base.

action.description: Short title of the action (copied from proposed_actions).

feasible.description: Whether the action can proceed under current urban rules.

constraints_applied.description: List of urban rules that apply to this action.

rule_id.description: ID of the matched rule from urban_rules.json.

rule_summary.description: Truncated text of the rule (max 120 chars).
rule_summary.example: All construction within designated flood zones must be elevated a minimum of 2 feet above the base flood elevation…

rejection_reason.description: Human-readable reason why the action was rejected. null when feasible=true.
rejection_reason.example: Conflicts with prohibition rule 'rule_001': Highways and major arterial roads cannot be modified or relocated without federal environmental impact assessment.

compliance_requirements.description: Steps required to achieve compliance when feasible=true. Empty array when feasible=false.

items.example: Critical compliance — rule_003: All construction within designated flood zones must be elevated a minimum of 2 feet above the base flood elevation…

notes.description: Summary note on the feasibility verdict.
notes.example: Action is feasible subject to the compliance requirements listed below. Regulatory approval must be obtained prior to implementation.

impact_metrics.description: Agent 3 (Evaluation Agent) aggregate output — overall plan impact scores.

overall_score.description: Weighted composite score for the plan (0–100).

flood_reduction_percent.description: Estimated reduction in flood risk across the affected area (%).

sustainability_score.description: Composite sustainability score based on ecological and energy impacts.

estimated_total_cost_usd.description: Sum of estimated_cost_usd across all proposed actions (USD).

implementation_timeline_months.description: Maximum implementation timeline across all actions (months).

co2_reduction_tons_per_year.description: Estimated combined CO₂ reduction in tonnes per year.

affected_population.description: Estimated number of people positively impacted by the plan.

feasibility_rate_percent.description: Percentage of proposed actions that passed feasibility checks.

recommendation.description: AI-generated recommendation on whether to proceed with the plan.
recommendation.example: Strong plan — proceed to detailed design. 75% of proposed actions are feasible and the combined impact scores are excellent.

per_action_metrics.description: Agent 3 (Evaluation Agent) per-action breakdown of impact metrics.

flood_reduction_contribution_percent.description: This action's individual contribution to flood reduction (%).

sustainability_contribution.description: This action's individual sustainability contribution score.

co2_reduction_tons_per_year.description: Estimated CO₂ reduction in tonnes/year attributed to this action.

affected_population.description: Number of people affected by this specific action.

implementation_timeline_months.description: Expected implementation time for this action in months.

examples.prompt: Reduce flooding in the low-lying residential districts near the river

proposed_actions.description: Construct a network of underground reinforced-concrete retention tanks with a combined capacity of 50,000 m³ to capture excess stormwater during heavy rainfall events and release it gradually into the drainage system.

proposed_actions.action: Restore and widen urban waterway corridors
proposed_actions.description: Widen existing drainage channels by 30% and rehabilitate riparian vegetation along 8 km of urban waterways to increase natural water absorption and reduce peak flow velocities.

proposed_actions.action: Install permeable paving across public precincts
proposed_actions.description: Replace 40,000 m² of impermeable asphalt in car parks, plazas, and footpaths with permeable pavers and gravel sub-base to increase on-site infiltration by an estimated 60%.

constraints_applied.rule_summary: All construction within designated flood zones must be elevated a minimum of 2 feet above the base flood elevation…

compliance_requirements: Critical compliance — rule_003: All construction within designated flood zones must be elevated a minimum of 2 feet above the base flood elevation…
validated_actions.notes: Action is feasible subject to the compliance requirements listed below. Regulatory approval must be obtained prior to implementation.

validated_actions.action: Restore and widen urban waterway corridors

constraints_applied.rule_summary: Highways and major arterial roads cannot be modified or relocated without federal environmental impact assessment…

validated_actions.rejection_reason: Conflicts with prohibition rule 'rule_001': Highways and major arterial roads cannot be modified or relocated without federal environmental impact assessment. This action cannot proceed without a formal regulatory variance.
validated_actions.notes: Action is blocked by a prohibition rule (rule_001). A formal variance or environmental impact assessment is required before this action can proceed.

impact_metrics.recommendation: Moderate plan — revise infeasible actions before proceeding. Consider substituting blocked actions with alternatives that meet the identified compliance requirements.

per_action_metrics.action: Restore and widen urban waterway corridors
